description: Extracts core geometric properties from a conic section, including foci and vertices. Uses 1-based indexing for multi-valued properties. Returns a point that can be passed to point().
utility: Extract foci and vertices from conic sections

arguments.name: conic
arguments.description: Conic section variable to extract property from

arguments.name: propertyType
arguments.description: Property name to extract, with 1-based index

alternates.description: Get nth focus of ellipse (n = 1 or 2)
Get nth vertex of ellipse (n = 1 to 4: 1-2 are major axis, 3-4 are minor axis)
Get the single focus of parabola
Get nth focus of hyperbola (n = 1 or 2)

examples.scenario: Draw both foci of an ellipse in red
Draw second focus of an ellipse
Draw first vertex of an ellipse in green
Draw both foci of a hyperbola
